headline: How The TDK (TSE:6762) Investment Story Is Shifting After A Conviction Downgrade
summary: The updated fair value for TDK now sits at ¥2,644, up from ¥2,611, giving you a refreshed reference point for where analysts currently peg the shares. This refined price target comes alongside TDK being removed from Goldman Sachs' APAC Conviction List, signalling that while detailed coverage continues, the name is no longer framed as a top tier idea. As you read on, you will see how these shifts fit into the broader analyst narrative and what to watch as the story around TDK evolves. Stay...
